issues: No simulation link provided - teachers must find/create their own interactive activity
Sorting cards and worksheets referenced but not included - teachers must create from scratch
Exit ticket blank template not provided
No actual Secwepemc language words or cultural content - only vague reference
Timing is tight: 5+15+10+10+5 = 45 min with no buffer for transitions or behavior management
Module numbering inconsistent between curriculum doc (Module 1) and lesson plan (no module label)
Materials section says 'simulation, worksheets' but none attached
No answer key or expected responses for discussion questions
First Peoples integration lacks concrete details - teachers need more support
suggestions: Add actual hyperlink to interactive simulation (e.g., Nearpod, PhET, or custom)
Provide completed exit ticket example with student work sample
Add 2-3 Secwepemc animal/plant names with pronunciations
Add 5-10 min buffer time or reduce some activities
Include rubric for the summative 'poster project' mentioned
Add specific discussion question answer stems/anchors
Provide checklist of materials with quantities needed
Add cross-reference to student-facing materials if separate
practical_notes: Structure is solid and teacher-friendly, but missing all supporting materials. A teacher could teach this with significant prep time to create the missing assets. Not a 'grab and go' lesson.
strengths: Clear SMART objectives with 90% accuracy target
